captureScope.current: [data-window-compare-stage] -- Storybook window component only, no OS taskbar

cropApplied.mobile: unchanged (1170x2382, no OS taskbar in mobile captures)

captureScope.note: Desktop reference PNGs and current PNGs were cropped to isomorphic heights before diff. OS taskbar strip is no longer a noise source.

results.driftSummary: Phase 5 closed: address-bar-icon (folder icon added to fixtures, addressLabel shortened to match live), search-trigger-label (text removed, icon-only trigger). Remaining: sidebar expand indicator (chevron icon vs unicode). Thumbnail differences are noise.

Phase 5 closed: search-overlay-layout and chip-bar-layout (search input removed from overlay, chips-only pill panel with flex-wrap layout). address-bar-icon also closed. Remaining: sidebar expand indicator. Thumbnail differences are noise.

Phase 5 closed: address-bar-icon and titlebar-icon (folder icon added to fixture, addressLabel shortened). High mismatch rate driven almost entirely by thumbnail images (noise). Structural layout matches.

Phase 5 closed: titlebar-tab-background-color (browser tab changed to #f9d0cf salmon/pink). address-bar-icon (no icon in browser address bar — matches live). Remaining: article-cover-image-crop (noise/fixture difference). Article body text is noise.

Phase 5 closed: titlebar-tab-background-color (salmon/pink tab). address-bar-edit-mode-style (focus ring already applied via border-blue-500 ring-1 ring-blue-500 when dropdownOpen=true). Remaining: address-bar-dropdown-layout (low priority positioning difference). Article body text is noise.

Phase 5 closed: titlebar-tab-background-color (salmon/pink tab) and address-bar-icon (no icon in browser address bar). Mismatch driven entirely by article content length (noise). Structural chrome matches.

summary.phase5Note: All 6 states still fail (any mismatch = fail) but mismatch % decreased across all states after Phase 5 drift closure. Remaining mismatch is dominated by noise sources (thumbnail images, article content).

thumbnail-images.reason: Storybook uses a single repeated repo-local thumbnail PNG. Live uses real article cover images. Not a component chrome concern.

entry-metadata-text.reason: Live uses real published dates/tags; Storybook uses fixture strings. Minor text rendering differences not related to component chrome.

article-body-text.reason: Storybook ArticleContent fixture is shorter than the live article body. Scroll-content length difference, not a chrome concern.

article-content-length.reason: Same as article-body-text -- fixture length vs full live article. Not a component chrome concern.

phase5ActionItems.description: Browser titlebar tab background is white/gray in Storybook but salmon/pink on live. Review Browser component titlebar color token to align with live site.
Storybook renders folder icon in address bar breadcrumb area. Live site does not show folder icon in the address bar. Remove or conditionalize the address icon in the toolbar.
Storybook search trigger shows text label. Live folder search trigger is an empty styled element (no visible text label). Remove text label from search trigger or set it to empty.

Storybook folder search overlay shows search input row above chips. Live chip overlay shows only chip pills with no input row. Align overlay structure: remove search input from overlay or make it absent by default.
Live shows chips as a flat pill row without a search input. Storybook shows a dropdown panel with search input above chips. Align chip pill overlay layout with live site.

Live address bar edit-mode renders a text input with highlighted border and cursor. Storybook controlled addressValue prop renders without focus ring. Apply focus ring / highlighted border to edit-mode address bar input.
Titlebar icon rendering differs between live and Storybook at mobile viewport. Align titlebar icon on mobile with live site.
Storybook uses unicode arrow character as expand toggle indicator. Live uses a different visual indicator. Consider aligning the expand indicator character or using an icon.
Live address bar dropdown positioning may differ from Storybook. Verify dropdown panel anchor and position match live edit-mode behavior.
Article cover image renders at a different crop/scale between live and Storybook fixture. Verify cover image crop matches live site rendering.
